english.hero_title: Professional Cleaning Services for Your Home & Office
english.hero_subtitle: Experience the difference with our expert cleaning team. We bring cleanliness to perfection.
english.feature_expert_text: Our certified cleaning professionals deliver exceptional results.
english.feature_trusted_text: Fully vetted staff. Your property is in safe hands.
english.feature_flexible_text: We work around your schedule. Same-day service!
english.footer_desc: Your trusted partner for professional cleaning services.
english.footer_copyright: © 2026 Yeka Cleaning Services. All rights reserved.
english.chat_welcome: Hello! Welcome to Yeka Cleaning! How can I help you today?
english.faq_pricing: Our pricing depends on the service type and area size. Residential cleaning starts from $50, Deep cleaning from $150. Contact us for a free quote!
english.faq_services: We offer: Residential Cleaning, Commercial Cleaning, Deep Cleaning, Carpet & Upholstery Cleaning, Window Cleaning, and Post-Construction Cleanup.
english.faq_booking: To book our services, please call us or fill out the contact form. We offer same-day service!

Email: wedajebimrew@gmail.com

english.faq_service: We offer: Residential Cleaning, Commercial Cleaning, Deep Cleaning, Carpet & Upholstery Cleaning, Window Cleaning, and Post-Construction Cleanup.

amharic.hero_title: ለቤትዎ እና ለቢሮዎ ሙያዊ የጽዳት አገልግሎት
amharic.hero_subtitle: ከባለሙያ የጽዳት ቡድናችን ጋር ልዩነቱን ይለማመዱ። ንጽህናን ወደ ፍጹምነት እንወስዳለን።
amharic.feature_expert_text: የተረጋገጡ የጽዳት ባለሙያዎቻችን የላቀ ውጤት ያስገኛሉ።
amharic.feature_trusted_text: ሙሉ በሙሉ የተጣራ ሰራተኞች። ንብረትዎ ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ እጅ ውስጥ ነው።
amharic.footer_copyright: © 2026 የካ የጽዳት አገልግሎቶች። ሁሉም መብቶች ተጠብቀዋል።
amharic.chat_welcome: ሰላም! እንኳን ወደ የካ ጽዳት በደህና መጡ! ዛሬ እንዴት ልረዳዎት እችላለሁ?
amharic.faq_pricing: የዋጋ መረጃችን በአገልግሎቱ ዓይነት እና በቦታ መጠን ላይ የሚወሰን ነው። የመኖሪያ ቤት ጽዳት ከ$50 ጀምሮ፣ ጥልቅ ጽዳት ከ$150 ጀምሮ። ለነጻ ጥቅስ ያግኙን!

amharic.faq_booking: አገልግሎታችንን ለማስያዝ እባክዎ ይደውሉልን ወይም የእውቂያ ቅጹን ይሙሉ። የቀኑ አገልግሎት እንሰጣለን!

oromifa.translate_content: Qabiyyee fuula kana hiikuu ni dandeessu
oromifa.hero_title: Tajaajila Qulqulleessaa Ogummaadhaan Mana keessaniifi Waajjira keessaniif
oromifa.hero_subtitle: Adeemsa kootu qulqulleessaa ogummaa keenyaa waliin addummaan sana qodaadhu. Qulqullina hamma guutuummatti geessina.
oromifa.feature_expert_text: Qulqulleessitoota keenyaa ragaa qaban bu'aalee adda ta'an ni argamsiisu.
oromifa.feature_trusted_text: Hojjettoonni sirriitti qormaatan. Qabeenyi keessan harka nageenyaatii jira.
oromifa.feature_flexible_text: Sagantaakeen waliin hojjenna. Tajaajila maaluma guyyaa sanatti!
oromifa.footer_desc: Hiriyaa amanamaa ta'e tajaajila qulqulleessaa ogummaadhaaniif.
oromifa.chat_welcome: Akkam! Qulqulleessaa Yekatti baga nagaan dhufte! Har'a maalun si gargaaruu danda'a?
oromifa.faq_pricing: Gatii keenya gosa tajaajilaa fi hangina ballina irratti hunda'a. Qulqulleessaa mana jireenyaa $50 irraa jalqaba, Qulqulleessaa gadifagoo $150 irraa jalqaba. Gatii bilisaaf nu qunnamaa!
oromifa.faq_services: Nu kennna: Qulqulleessaa Mana Jireenyaa, Qulqulleessaa Daldalaa, Qulqulleessaa Gadifagoo, Qulqulleessaa Afaa fi Huccuu, Qulqulleessaa Foddaa, fi Qulqulleessaa Cimaa ijaaruun booddee.
oromifa.faq_booking: Tajaajila keenya qabsiisuuf, bilbilaan nu bilbilaa ykn foormii qunnamaa guutaa. Tajaajila guyyaa sanatti kennna!

tigrigna.translate_content: ዘለዎ ጽሑፍ ናይ እዚ ገጽ ክትተርጕምዎ ትኽእሉ ኢኹም
tigrigna.hero_title: ንቤትካን ቤት ጽሕፈትካን ሞያዊ ኣገልግሎት ምጽራይ
tigrigna.hero_subtitle: ምስ ባለሙዛ ጻደይ ጉጅለና እቲ ፍልልይ ተመክርዎ። ንጽህና ናብ ፍጽምና ከነብጽሓ ንምነ።
tigrigna.feature_expert_text: እቶም ረኺቦም ዘለዉ ጻደይ ባለሙህታትና ብሉጽ ውጽኢት የውጽኡ።
tigrigna.feature_trusted_text: ምሉእ ብምሉእ ዝረአዩ ሰራሕተኛታት። ንብረትኩም ኣብ ዕዉት ኢድ ኣሎ።
tigrigna.service_deep_desc: ምሉእ ብምሉእ ካብ ላዕሊ ኽሳብ ታሕቲ ምጽራይ
tigrigna.chat_welcome: ሰላም! ናብ ምጽራይ የካ እንቋዕ ብደሓን መጻእኩም! ሎሚ ብኸመይ ክሕግዘኩም እኽእል፧
tigrigna.faq_pricing: ዋጋታትና ብዓይነት ኣገልግሎትን ብመጠን ቦታን ይውሰን። ምጽራይ መንበሪ ቤት ካብ $50 ጀሚሩ፣ ዓሚቝ ምጽራይ ካብ $150 ጀሚሩ። ንናጻ ጥቕሲ ራኸቡና!
tigrigna.faq_services: ነዚ ንኽትከልክዎ፦ ምጽራይ መንበሪ ቤት፣ ምጽራይ ንግዳዊ ቦታ፣ ዓሚቝ ምጽራይ፣ ምጽራይ ሰገድን ጨርቃ ጨርቂ ኣቝሑን፣ ምጽራይ መስኮት፣ ከምኡውን ድሕረ-ህንጻ ምጽራይ።
tigrigna.faq_booking: ኣገልግሎታትና ንምዳልዋው፣ ብስልኺ ደውሉልና ወይ እቲ ፎርም ርክብ ምላእዎ። ኣገልግሎት በቲ መዓልቲ ነቕርብ!
tigrigna.faq_contact:
ከምዚ ብዝስዕብ መገዲ ክትራኸቡና ትኽእሉ ኢኹም፦
ስልኺ፦ 0931503513
ኢመይል፦ wedajebimrew@gmail.com

tigrigna.faq_service: ነዚ ንኽትከልክዎ፦ ምጽራይ መንበሪ ቤት፣ ምጽራይ ንግዳዊ ቦታ፣ ዓሚቝ ምጽራይ፣ ምጽራይ ሰገድን ጨርቃ ጨርቂ ኣቝሑን፣ ምጽራይ መስኮት፣ ከምኡውን ድሕረ-ህንጻ ምጽራይ።
tigrigna.faq_cleaning: ንገዛኡን ንቤተ ጽሕፈታትን ሞያዊ ኣገልግሎት ምጽራይ ነቕርብ። ንዝያዳ ሓበሬታ ገጽ ኣገልግሎታትና ርኣዩ!
